claim: Claude Skills are saved reusable prompts that load into agents only when triggered, preventing context bloat
actionable: Organize long prompts as skills rather than system prompts to keep agent context clean and focused
source_title: Claude Skills Tutorial (2026): Build, Run, and Share

claim: Claude Skills are created via skill creator skill which asks clarifying questions to refine the skill before testing against examples
actionable: Use Claude's skill creator to iteratively refine skills; add test examples to validate quality before saving
source_title: Claude Skills Tutorial (2026): Build, Run, and Share

claim: Skills can embed code (Python) alongside prompts, enabling complex logic without leaving the skill definition
actionable: Include validation code in skills to check business rules before agent actions, e.g., payroll sanity checks
source_title: Claude Skills Tutorial (2026): Build, Run, and Share

claim: Skills can be invoked via slash command or automatically via context matching, but slash command is more reliable
actionable: Always invoke important skills explicitly with slash command rather than relying on automatic context detection
source_title: Claude Skills Tutorial (2026): Build, Run, and Share

claim: Claude Skills in Code live as folders in .claude/skills on disk, enabling team sharing via Git or shared drives
actionable: Store Claude Code skills in .claude/skills folder and version control them in Git for team collaboration
source_title: Claude Skills Tutorial (2026): Build, Run, and Share

claim: Organization-wide Claude Team admins can upload skills to be accessible across entire organization without editing rights
actionable: As admin, upload company-standard skills to organization settings so all users can access but not modify them
source_title: Claude Skills Tutorial (2026): Build, Run, and Share
